markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new team structure and review performance for an upcoming board deck.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Team Structure:** Jo Kaminska (Engagement Manager) now leads strategy/analytics, while Mariana Montezzana (Managing Editor) handles production. This model was adopted to provide more strategic value and better scale operations.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [**Performance for Board Deck:** Key metrics for the board deck show strong growth since September:](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
      - [**SEO:** Queries ranking on page 1 grew from 41 to 90 (top 10) and from 260 to 402 (top 2–10).](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
      - [**Traffic:** Blog sessions rose from 76 to 150, with engaged sessions (multi-page views) increasing from 25 to 92, indicating higher user quality.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
      - [**AEO:** Ambient is now present in LLM responses (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity), driving small but highly engaged traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
  - [**Messaging Fixed:** A pipeline error causing "threat detection vs. access control" confusion is resolved. Mariana rewrote all in-review articles and updated writing guidelines to prevent recurrence.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [**Competitor Ad Spend:** Direct ad spend data is unavailable. GrowthX recommended using tools like SEMrush or SpyFu to analyze competitor bidding strategies and identify keyword opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Topics

### New Team Structure & Client Concerns

  - [**New Roles:**](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [**Jo Kaminska (Engagement Manager):** Leads strategy, analytics, and performance reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [**Mariana Montezzana (Managing Editor):** Manages all content production and editing.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [**Client Concern:** Everest voiced concern about the second team change, fearing a loss of momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The editor (Mariana) is the key contact for ensuring technical messaging nuance, which is critical for reducing review time.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Jo confirmed Mariana will remain the primary production contact, attend meetings through December, and continue editing all content.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

### Content & Messaging Updates

  - [**Problem:** A pipeline error caused confusion between "threat detection" and "access control."](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [**Solution:** Mariana identified and corrected the source of the error in the content generation instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Action:** All in-review articles were rewritten to reflect the correct messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
      - [**Note:** Some docs have a new tab with the corrected version, preserving the original for comparison.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:** Client feedback was converted into formal writing guidelines to prevent future errors.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [**Request:** Everest to review \~5 more articles this week to provide feedback that can be incorporated into the guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

### Performance Reporting for Board Deck

  - [**Need:** Data for a board deck due tomorrow, showing progress since publishing began in September.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [**Key Metrics & Story:**](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
      - [**Volume:** Articles published per month (e.g., Sept: 4, Oct: 10, Nov: 20) → Demonstrates scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)
      - [**Traffic (Sessions):**](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
          - [Sept: 76 total / 25 engaged](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
          - [Oct: 120 total / 73 engaged](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
          - [Nov: 150 total / 92 engaged](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
          - [**Significance:** Rising engagement rate indicates higher user quality.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
      - [**SEO (Queries on Page 1):**](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
          - [**Top 10:** 41 → 90 queries](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)
          - [**Top 2–10:** 260 → 402 queries](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)
          - [**Significance:** Shows a significant increase in first-page visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
      - [**AEO (LLM Presence):**](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
          - [**Presence:** Now appearing in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini responses.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
          - [**Traffic:** Small but highly engaged (e.g., 13 sessions from ChatGPT).](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
          - [**Significance:** Establishes an early foothold in a growing channel.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)

### Competitor Ad Spend Analysis

  - [**Request:** Alberto asked for competitor digital ad spend data.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [**Finding:** Direct ad spend figures are not publicly available.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [**Recommendation:** Use tools like SEMrush or SpyFu to analyze competitor PPC strategies (e.g., keywords, bids, traffic).](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
      - [**Goal:** Identify untapped commercial keywords or topics.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [**Action:** Jo will ask GrowthX directors if they have other methods for this analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2617.0)
      - [Send monthly performance report (Aug–Nov) for the board deck, including:](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
          - [Monthly article count.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)
          - [SEO query growth (Top 10, Top 2–10).](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
          - [LLM presence data (remove competitors).](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
      - [Ask GrowthX directors about methods for analyzing competitor ad spend.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [**Everest:**](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
      - [Review \~5 more articles this week to provide feedback for writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/rqfab3sbkGcMPbSr5tX2tL9hn4v5bt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
